# Hyperliquid Copy Trading

> Discover and copy trade 270+ Hyperliquid vaults ranked by quantitative metrics. Free, open-source, updated daily.

## What This Site Does

This is a free, open-source ranking dashboard for Hyperliquid copy-trading vaults. It fetches on-chain vault data daily via GitHub Actions, computes quantitative metrics (Sharpe ratio, annualized return, max drawdown, win rate), and presents a ranked leaderboard.

## Key Metrics

- **Radar Score**: Composite score (0–100) combining Sharpe, return, drawdown, win rate, and activity metrics.
- **Sharpe Ratio**: Risk-adjusted return. Higher is better; above 1.0 is good, above 2.0 is excellent.
- **Annualized Return (ARR)**: Projected yearly return based on historical performance.
- **Max Drawdown (MDD)**: Largest peak-to-trough decline. Lower absolute value is better.
- **Win Rate**: Percentage of profitable trades.
- **Time in Market**: Percentage of time the vault has open positions.

## Data

- Live JSON data: https://maorenxin.github.io/CopyTrading/data/traders.json
- Updated daily at ~02:23 UTC via GitHub Actions pipeline.
- Source vaults listed in VAULTS.csv; trade history, funding, and ledger data processed through quantstats.

## AI Skill (MCP Integration)

Install the CopyTrading AI Skill to query vault data from any MCP-compatible AI assistant:

```
https://maorenxin.github.io/CopyTrading/skill/skill.json
```

## Links

- Website: https://maorenxin.github.io/CopyTrading/
- Source code: https://github.com/maorenxin/CopyTrading
- Data API: https://maorenxin.github.io/CopyTrading/data/traders.json
